title: Orthodon fomosanus
taxonomy: Orthodon fomosanus is a genus of fossilized land snail, belonging to the phylum Mollusca. It is classified under the class Gastropoda, which includes other land snails, slugs, and some marine snails. Within the class Gastropoda, Orthodon fomosanus falls under the subclass Pulmonata, which consists of air-breathing land snails. Further classification places Orthodon fomosanus under the infraclass Pulmonata, which is characterized by the presence of a lung and a radula. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships between different species of snails and slugs.
